title: Add subtraction support
body:
The Calculator class needs a `subtract` method that returns the difference of two numbers.

Acceptance criteria:
- `subtract(5, 3)` returns `2`
- `subtract(2, 5)` returns `-3`
- Tests cover both cases

title: Add multiplication support
body:
The Calculator class needs a `multiply` method that returns the product of two numbers.

Acceptance criteria:
- `multiply(3, 4)` returns `12`
- `multiply(0, 5)` returns `0`
- `multiply(-2, 3)` returns `-6`
- Tests cover all cases
